recommendations.title: The Seven Deadly Sins: Grudge of Edinburgh Part 1
recommendations.overview: Tristan, the son of Meliodas and Elizabeth, inherits the power of the Goddess Clan and can heal people’s wounds and injuries, but he often ends up hurting others due to his inability to control his Demon Clan power. To protect his family, Tristan hea

recommendations.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart in Peril
recommendations.overview: Ogami Itto is hired to kill a tattooed female assassin and battles Retsudo, head of the Yagyu clan, and his son Gunbei.

recommendations.title: Babylon 5: A Call to Arms
recommendations.overview: Allies of the Shadows seek revenge against humanity. This movie sets up the series, "Crusade," the sequel to "Babylon 5."

recommendations.title: Ironclad
recommendations.overview: In the year 1215, the rebel barons of England have forced their despised King John to put his royal seal on the Magna Carta, a seminal document that upheld the rights of free men. Yet within months of pledging himself to the great charter, the King r

recommendations.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart at the River Styx
recommendations.overview: Ogami Itto battles a group of female ninja in the employ of the Yagyu clan and must eliminate a traitor who plans to sell his clan's secrets to the Shogunate.

recommendations.title: The Lost Viking
recommendations.overview: A young Viking called Vitharr arrives in Britain with dreams of conquest and adventure, but when his family and clan are ambushed and killed, he must survive alone in this strange,dangerous new land as he searches for his Uncle's settlement.

recommendations.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past
recommendations.overview: The ultimate X-Men ensemble fights a war for the survival of the species across two time periods as they join forces with their younger selves in an epic battle that must change the past – to save our future.

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: Baaghi 3
recommendations.overview: A man embarks on a bloody rampage to save his kidnapped brother.

recommendations.title: Ants in the Pants 2
recommendations.overview: In the sequel of "Ants in the Pants" we again meet Flo and his friends.
